name: pi-pai
description_en: Personal AI Infrastructure extension for Pi — full v4.0.3 sync: ISC splitting test, count gates, anti-criteria, capability tracking, time budgets, enhanced observability, agent personas, sentiment tracking, self-evolution, Ralph iteration, damage control
description_zh: Pi 的个人 AI 基础设施扩展 — 完整 v4.0.3 同步：ISC 分裂测试、计数门、反标准、能力跟踪、时间预算、增强可观察性、代理角色、情感跟踪、自我进化、Ralph 迭代、损害控制
